title: getCell("B2").value
author: SaidqodirxonUz
body:
## I can't get the value in cell B2.

**Hello everyone.
I am unable to get the value in cell B2 from the displayed excel table while using ExcelJs, ReactJs.

Online resources:
1. console.log(editedSheet.getCell("B2").value,"1");
2. console.log(worksheet.getRow(row).getCell(2).text,"2");
It is said that it can be obtained using these two methods, 
![exceljsERROR](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/115058529/4a36db1c-b5ad-455e-987d-21e272825de8)
![exceljsERROR](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/115058529/d23d8d89-3de3-4ed3-ade2-f93d0bffa03f)
but I have
NULL in case 1,
In case 2, nothing comes out.
Please help.**
